title: spyglass-magnifying glass
description: replaces the spyglass with a magnifying glass
body:
![spyglass-magnifying glass](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b5cabb2b973381e424ff44da432da66a67f758d2_0.webp)

**This non-standard set of resources changes the model and texture of the spyglass, replacing it with a magnifying glass. The sounds are also modified, and the texture itself is very similar to the item's recipe.**
## 
what exactly is he doing
 - **changes the model and texture of the spyglass**
 - **changes the sounds of the spyglass**
 - **changes the screen scale the spyglass**
